chronology.description: SIEM correlation alert: anomalous OAuth token use for finance mailbox from unrecognized ASN
Confirmed session hijack indicators; escalated to major incident and paged on-call IC
Incident declared; bridge opened; roles assigned
Disabled compromised service account and revoked active sessions
Identified malicious inbox rule and forwarding address; queued for removal
Executive situation report issued on the bridge

open.description: Remove malicious inbox rule and forwarding address
Rotate credentials and secrets for affected identities
Validate mailbox integrity and restore normal routing

overdue.description: Remove malicious inbox rule and forwarding address

evidence.description: M365 unified audit log for affected mailbox

decisions.description: Isolate the finance file share segment pending forensic imaging
decisions.recommendation: Isolate segment; accept temporary degradation of internal reporting

decisions.description: Engage the external DFIR forensics retainer
decisions.recommendation: Engage retainer to preserve and image affected hosts

decisions.description: Whether regulated-data exposure triggers external notification obligations
decisions.recommendation: Route to legal/privacy counsel for a notification decision; prepare evidence for the resilience reporter

communications.summary: Situation report: containment achieved on primary identity; scope assessment ongoing

notification_reminders.reminder: Data-protection and breach-notification clocks MAY apply. Route the notification decision to legal/privacy counsel; for drafting jurisdiction reports, hand off to operational-resilience-reporter.
notification_reminders.note: Reminder only - not a determination that notification is required and not a filing.

notification_reminders.reminder: BCP/continuity obligations and customer/stakeholder communications MAY apply. Confirm with the business-continuity and communications owners.
notification_reminders.note: Reminder only - no communication has been sent by this skill.

post_incident_actions.description: Add detection for anomalous OAuth token replay
Review conditional-access policy for finance mailboxes

narrative: Coordination snapshot for INC-2026-0042 as of 2026-07-17T14:00. Suggested severity band SEV1 (Critical); basis: confirmed regulated-data exposure of 1200 records. This is a proposed band for the incident commander to confirm, not a binding classification. All five mandatory IR roles are filled and every chronology entry and evidence item is source-linked. Three decisions are tracked: D-2 was adjudicated by the incident commander (IC-1); D-1 (segment isolation) and D-3 (notification obligations) remain pending human adjudication. One eradication task (T-2) is past its due time and is flagged for the incident commander. Notification reminders have been routed to legal/privacy counsel and the resilience owners because data-protection and continuity clocks may apply; those owners decide whether any obligation applies and own any external report. No regulated decision, incident closure, or regulatory filing has been made by this skill. Coordination record only; recommendations and evidence for human adjudication. No regulated decision, severity classification, incident closure, regulatory filing, or system-of-record write has been performed by this skill.
disclaimer: Coordination record only; recommendations and evidence for human adjudication. No regulated decision, severity classification, incident closure, regulatory filing, or system-of-record write has been performed by this skill.
